spell.name: Alarm
spell.desc: You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Ward an area; trigger an audible or mental alarm if trespassed.

spell.name: Alter Self
spell.desc: You assume a different form. Change your appearance, grow natural weapons, or adapt for aquatic environments.

spell.name: Animal Friendship
spell.desc: Convince a beast it means you no harm. The beast must have an Intelligence of 3 or lower.

spell.name: Animal Messenger
spell.desc: A Tiny beast carries a brief message to a location you specify.

spell.name: Animate Dead
spell.desc: Create an undead servant. Turn a pile of bones or a corpse into a skeleton or zombie under your control.

spell.name: Antilife Shell
spell.desc: A shimmering barrier extends out from you, preventing living creatures from passing or reaching through it.

spell.name: Antimagic Field
spell.desc: A sphere of antimagic surrounds you, suppressing magic within or passing through the area.

spell.name: Arcane Eye
spell.desc: Create an invisible magical eye to send in any direction. See through it with darkvision up to 30 ft.

spell.name: Arcane Gate
spell.desc: Create linked teleportation portals that remain open as long as you maintain concentration.

spell.name: Arcane Lock
spell.desc: Magically lock a closed door, window, chest, or entrance. You and those you designate can still pass.

spell.name: Astral Projection
spell.desc: Project your astral body and those of up to eight willing creatures into the Astral Plane.

spell.name: Bane
spell.desc: Up to three creatures of your choice must subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws.

spell.name: Banishment
spell.desc: Attempt to send one creature to another plane. On a failed Charisma save the target is banished.

spell.name: Beast Sense
spell.desc: You perceive through a willing beast's senses. See, hear, and smell using the animal's senses.

spell.name: Bestow Curse
spell.desc: Touch a creature and curse it. Choose one of several curse effects: disadvantage, Wis saves vs action loss, etc.

spell.name: Bigby's Hand
spell.desc: Create a Large hand of shimmering force. Can clenched fist, forceful hand, grasping hand, or interposing hand.

spell.name: Blade Barrier
spell.desc: Create a vertical wall of whirling, razor-sharp blades made of magical energy that deals 6d10 slashing damage.

spell.name: Blight
spell.desc: Necromantic energy washes over a creature. On a failed Con save, takes 8d8 necrotic damage (half on success).

spell.name: Blink
spell.desc: Roll a d20 each turn. On 11+, you vanish to the Ethereal Plane until the start of your next turn.

spell.name: Blur
spell.desc: Your body blurs and wavers. Attackers have disadvantage on attack rolls against you.

spell.name: Burning Hands
spell.desc: Shoot a thin sheet of flames from your outstretched fingertips. 3d6 fire damage (Dex save for half).

spell.name: Calm Emotions
spell.desc: Suppress strong emotions in a group. Creatures in a 20-foot radius must make Charisma saving throws.

spell.name: Charm Person
spell.desc: Attempt to charm a humanoid within range. On a failed Wis save, it is charmed by you for the duration.

spell.name: Circle of Death
spell.desc: A sphere of negative energy ripples out. Creatures in a 60-foot radius take 8d6 necrotic damage (Con save for half).

spell.name: Clairvoyance
spell.desc: Create an invisible sensor at a location within range. Hear or see through it.

spell.name: Cloudkill
spell.desc: Create a 20-foot sphere of poisonous yellow-green fog. Living creatures in it take 5d8 poison damage each turn.

spell.name: Command
spell.desc: Speak a one-word command to a creature. On a failed Wis save, the creature follows the command on its turn.

spell.name: Commune with Nature
spell.desc: Briefly become one with nature and gain knowledge of the surrounding territory up to 3 miles.

spell.name: Comprehend Languages
spell.desc: Understand the literal meaning of any spoken language and written language you see.

spell.name: Cone of Cold
spell.desc: Blast of cold air erupts from your hands. Creatures in the cone take 8d8 cold damage (Con save for half).

spell.name: Confusion
spell.desc: Assault and twist minds of up to creatures in a 10-foot sphere. They must make Wis saves or act erratically.

spell.name: Contagion
spell.desc: Your touch inflicts disease. Make a melee spell attack; on hit, the target is poisoned until the spell ends.

spell.name: Control Water
spell.desc: Direct the movement of water. Flood, part, redirect, or whirlpool a body of water.

spell.name: Control Weather
spell.desc: Take control of the weather within 5 miles. Change precipitation, temperature, and wind.

spell.name: Create Food and Water
spell.desc: Conjure 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of water on the ground or in containers within range.

spell.name: Create or Destroy Water
spell.desc: Create up to 10 gallons of clean water or destroy the same amount of water.

spell.name: Create Undead
spell.desc: Create up to three undead servants (ghouls, shadows, or wights) that obey your commands.

spell.name: Crown of Madness
spell.desc: One humanoid of your choice that you can see must succeed on a Wis save or become charmed and act erratically.

spell.name: Cure Wounds
spell.desc: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

spell.name: Dancing Lights
spell.desc: Create up to four torch-sized lights or one glowing form that sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius.

spell.name: Darkness
spell.desc: Magical darkness spreads from a point within range, filling a 15-foot-radius sphere.

spell.name: Daylight
spell.desc: A 60-foot-radius sphere of light spreads out from a point you choose within range.

spell.name: Detect Evil and Good
spell.desc: Know whether there is an aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead within 30 feet.

spell.name: Detect Magic
spell.desc: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. See a faint aura around any visible creature or object that bears magic.

spell.name: Detect Thoughts
spell.desc: Read the thoughts of certain creatures. Probe deeper to get surface thoughts, then deeper to read full thoughts.

spell.name: Dimension Door
spell.desc: Teleport yourself from your current location to any other spot within range.

spell.name: Disguise Self
spell.desc: Make yourself look different. Change height by 1 foot, weight, clothing, and facial features.

spell.name: Dispel Evil and Good
spell.desc: Shimmering energy surrounds and protects you. Advantage on saves against extraplanar creatures. Can dismiss them.

spell.name: Dispel Magic
spell.desc: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on it ends.

spell.name: Dissonant Whispers
spell.desc: Whisper a discordant melody. The target must make a Wis save or take 3d6 psychic damage and use its reaction to flee.

spell.name: Divination
spell.desc: Receive a truthful reply from a divine power about a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days.

spell.name: Dominate Beast
spell.desc: Attempt to beguile a beast. On a failed Wis save, the creature is charmed and you control its actions.

spell.name: Dominate Monster
spell.desc: Attempt to beguile any creature you can see. On a failed Wis save, the creature is charmed and you control it.

spell.name: Dominate Person
spell.desc: Attempt to beguile a humanoid. On a failed Wis save, the creature is charmed and you control its actions.

spell.name: Druidcraft
spell.desc: Whispering to the spirits of nature, create minor effects like tiny nature effects, predict weather, etc.

spell.name: Enhance Ability
spell.desc: Grant a creature advantage on ability checks of your choice for the duration.

spell.name: Enlarge/Reduce
spell.desc: Cause a creature or object to grow larger or smaller.

spell.name: Entangle
spell.desc: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground. Creatures in a 20-foot square must make Str saves or be restrained.

spell.name: Etherealness
spell.desc: Step into the Border Ethereal. Move in any direction (including up/down). Return at will.

spell.name: Evard's Black Tentacles
spell.desc: Tentacles fill a 20-foot square on ground in range. Creatures there take 3d6 bludgeoning and are restrained.

spell.name: Fabricate
spell.desc: Convert raw materials into products. You can fabricate a Large object or several smaller objects.

spell.name: Faerie Fire
spell.desc: Outline objects and creatures in a 20-foot cube with light. Affected creatures can't benefit from being invisible.

spell.name: Fear
spell.desc: Project a phantasmal image of worst fears. Creatures in cone must make Wis saves or become frightened.

spell.name: Feeblemind
spell.desc: Blast a creature's mind, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality. Target makes an Int save or drops Int and Cha to 1.

spell.name: Find Steed
spell.desc: Summon a spirit that takes the form of an unusually intelligent, strong, and loyal steed.

spell.name: Finger of Death
spell.desc: Send negative energy coursing through a creature. 7d8+30 necrotic damage (Con save for half). Killed humanoids rise as zombies.

spell.name: Fireball
spell.desc: Bright streak explodes into a 20-foot-radius sphere of fire. Creatures in area take 8d6 fire damage (Dex save for half).

spell.name: Flame Strike
spell.desc: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens. Creatures in a 10-foot radius take 4d6 fire + 4d6 radiant.

spell.name: Fly
spell.desc: A willing creature gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration.

spell.name: Fog Cloud
spell.desc: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point. The area is heavily obscured.

spell.name: Forcecage
spell.desc: Immovable, invisible, cube-shaped prison of magical force springs into existence. Can be barred box or open lattice.

spell.name: Freedom of Movement
spell.desc: Touch a willing creature. For the duration, the creature ignores difficult terrain and magical effects that reduce speed.

spell.name: Friends
spell.desc: Gain advantage on Charisma checks against one creature. When the spell ends, the creature realizes you used magic.

spell.name: Gaseous Form
spell.desc: Transform a willing creature and everything it's wearing into a misty cloud. 10-foot flying speed, resistance to nonmagical damage.

spell.name: Gate
spell.desc: Open a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see within range to a precise location on a different plane.

spell.name: Globe of Invulnerability
spell.desc: Immobile, slightly shimmering barrier appears within range. Any spell of 5th level or lower can't affect creatures inside.

spell.name: Greater Invisibility
spell.desc: You or a creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Attacks and spells don't break it.

spell.name: Greater Restoration
spell.desc: Imbue a creature with positive energy to undo debilitating effects. Remove charm, petrification, curse, ability score reduction, or max HP reduction.

spell.name: Guardian of Faith
spell.desc: A Large spectral guardian appears, attacking hostile creatures that approach within 10 feet for 20 radiant damage.

spell.name: Guidance
spell.desc: Touch a willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the creature can roll a d4 and add the result to one ability check.

spell.name: Gust of Wind
spell.desc: Line of strong wind blasts from you in a 60-foot line. Creatures must make Str saves or be pushed 15 feet away.

spell.name: Hallucinatory Terrain
spell.desc: Make natural terrain in a 150-foot cube look, sound, and smell like some other sort of natural terrain.

spell.name: Heal
spell.desc: Choose a creature within range. It regains 70 hit points, and all diseases, blindness, and deafness are removed.

spell.name: Heat Metal
spell.desc: Make a manufactured metal object glow red-hot. The creature holding it takes 2d8 fire damage and may drop it.

spell.name: Hold Monster
spell.desc: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Wis save or be paralyzed for the duration. Any creature type.

spell.name: Hold Person
spell.desc: Choose a humanoid you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wis save or be paralyzed for the duration.

spell.name: Hunger of Hadar
spell.desc: Open a gateway to the dark between stars. A 20-foot-radius sphere of blackness. Creatures inside take 2d6 cold/acid damage.

spell.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spell.desc: Create a twisting pattern of colors that weaves through the air. Creatures seeing it must make Wis saves or be charmed.

spell.name: Ice Storm
spell.desc: Hail of rock-hard ice pounds in a 20-foot-radius/40-foot-high cylinder. 2d8 bludgeoning + 4d6 cold damage.

spell.name: Insect Plague
spell.desc: Swarming locusts fill a 20-foot-radius sphere. The area is lightly obscured. Creatures take 4d10 piercing damage.

spell.name: Invisibility
spell.desc: A creature you touch becomes invisible. Anything it's wearing or carrying is also invisible. Ends on attacking or casting.

spell.name: Knock
spell.desc: Choose an object in range that is locked, stuck, or barred. The object opens. Sets off locks, wedges, and bolts.

spell.name: Lesser Restoration
spell.desc: Touch a creature and end one disease or one condition afflicting it: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

spell.name: Levitate
spell.desc: One creature or object of your choice rises vertically, up to 20 feet, and remains suspended there.

spell.name: Light
spell.desc: Touch one object no larger than 10 feet. The object sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light an additional 20 feet.

spell.name: Lightning Bolt
spell.desc: A bolt of lightning forms a line 100 feet long. Each creature in the line takes 8d6 lightning damage (Dex save for half).

spell.name: Locate Animals or Plants
spell.desc: Describe or name a specific kind of beast or plant. You sense the direction and distance to the closest one within 5 miles.

spell.name: Locate Object
spell.desc: Describe or name an object familiar to you. You sense the direction and distance to it, as long as it's within 1000 feet.

spell.name: Mage Armor
spell.desc: Touch a willing creature wearing no armor. Its base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier.

spell.name: Mage Hand
spell.desc: Create a spectral, floating hand that can pick up, move, or manipulate light objects up to 10 pounds.

spell.name: Major Image
spell.desc: Create the image of an object, creature, or visible phenomenon no larger than a 20-foot cube. Includes sound, smell, temperature.

spell.name: Mass Cure Wounds
spell.desc: A wave of healing energy washes out. Up to six creatures in a 30-foot radius each regain 3d8 + spellcasting modifier HP.

spell.name: Mass Suggestion
spell.desc: Suggest a course of action to up to twelve creatures you can see. Each must make a Wis save or follow the suggestion.

spell.name: Maze
spell.desc: Banish a creature into a labyrinthine demiplane. It remains there until it makes a DC 20 Intelligence check to escape.

spell.name: Meld into Stone
spell.desc: Step into a stone object or surface large enough to contain you. Use stone to hide, rest, or wait.

spell.name: Mending
spell.desc: Repair a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken link in a chain, a torn cloak, etc.

spell.name: Message
spell.desc: Point your finger toward a creature within range and whisper a message. The target can whisper back.

spell.name: Mind Blank
spell.desc: Until the spell ends, one willing creature is immune to psychic damage, divination spells, and the charmed condition.

spell.name: Minor Illusion
spell.desc: Create a sound or an image of an object within range. A sound continues or be intermittent throughout the duration.

spell.name: Mirage Arcane
spell.desc: Make terrain in an area up to 1 mile square look, sound, smell, and even feel like some other sort of terrain.

spell.name: Mislead
spell.desc: Become invisible and simultaneously create an illusory double. Direct the double to move and gesture.

spell.name: Modify Memory
spell.desc: Attempt to reshape another creature's memories. The target must make a Wis save or you alter its memory of an event.

spell.name: Nondetection
spell.desc: For the duration, you hide a target from divination magic and scrying sensors.

spell.name: Otto's Irresistible Dance
spell.desc: Choose one creature you can see. It must make a Wis save or begin dancing uncontrollably.

spell.name: Pass without Trace
spell.desc: Veil of shadows envelops you and companions within 30 feet. +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

spell.name: Phantasmal Force
spell.desc: Craft an illusion that takes root in the mind of one creature. On a failed Int save, the target perceives the illusion.

spell.name: Phantom Steed
spell.desc: Create a Large quasi-real horse-like creature, with a speed of 100 feet.

spell.name: Plane Shift
spell.desc: Transport yourself and up to eight willing creatures to a different plane. Can also banish an unwilling creature.

spell.name: Plant Growth
spell.desc: Cause plants within 100 feet to grow rapidly, making area difficult terrain. Or enrich land for a year.

spell.name: Polymorph
spell.desc: Transform a creature into a new form. Unwilling targets make Wis saves. Change into beast with CR ≤ target's CR/level.

spell.name: Power Word Kill
spell.desc: Utter a word of power that can compel one creature to die instantly. If it has 100 or fewer HP, it dies.

spell.name: Prestidigitation
spell.desc: Create minor magical effects: small fire, clean or soil, chill or warm, create a mark, create a trinket, etc.

spell.name: Programmed Illusion
spell.desc: Create an illusion of an object, creature, or phenomenon that activates when a specific condition is met.

spell.name: Project Image
spell.desc: Create an illusory copy of yourself. It looks and sounds like you and can appear anywhere within range.

spell.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spell.desc: A willing creature is protected against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead.

spell.name: Rary's Telepathic Bond
spell.desc: Forge a telepathic link among up to eight willing creatures. They can communicate telepathically.

spell.name: Remove Curse
spell.desc: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end. If the object is a cursed magic item, its curse remains.

spell.name: Reverse Gravity
spell.desc: Reverse gravity in a 50-foot-radius, 100-foot-high cylinder. Creatures and objects fall upward.

spell.name: Revivify
spell.desc: Touch a creature that has died within the last minute. It returns to life with 1 hit point.

spell.name: Scrying
spell.desc: See and hear a particular creature in the same plane. The target makes a Wis save (modified by familiarity).

spell.name: See Invisibility
spell.desc: You see invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible, and can see into the Ethereal Plane.

spell.name: Seeming
spell.desc: Change the appearance of any number of creatures you can see. Each target appears how you decide.

spell.name: Sending
spell.desc: Send a short message of up to 25 words to a creature with which you are familiar. The target can reply.

spell.name: Silence
spell.desc: No sound can be created or pass through a 20-foot-radius sphere. Creatures inside are immune to thunder damage.

spell.name: Silent Image
spell.desc: Create the image of an object, creature, or visible phenomenon no larger than a 15-foot cube.

spell.name: Sleep
spell.desc: Send creatures into a magical slumber. Roll 5d8; total determines HP of creatures affected, starting with lowest.

spell.name: Sleet Storm
spell.desc: Freezing rain and sleet fall in a 20-foot-high cylinder, 40-foot radius. Ground is difficult terrain.

spell.name: Slow
spell.desc: Alter time around up to six creatures. Speed is halved, -2 penalty to AC and Dex saves, can't use reactions.

spell.name: Spare the Dying
spell.desc: Touch a living creature that has 0 hit points. The creature becomes stable.

spell.name: Speak with Animals
spell.desc: You gain the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration.

spell.name: Speak with Dead
spell.desc: Grant the semblance of life to a corpse. You can ask it up to five questions. It answers from its memories.

spell.name: Spider Climb
spell.desc: A willing creature gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings.

spell.name: Spike Growth
spell.desc: Ground in a 20-foot radius becomes covered in sharp spikes. Area is difficult terrain; 2d4 piercing for every 5 ft.

spell.name: Stinking Cloud
spell.desc: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of yellow, nauseating gas. Creatures inside who fail Con saves waste their action.

spell.name: Stone Shape
spell.desc: Touch a stone object or section of stone, shaping it into any form that suits your purpose.

spell.name: Suggestion
spell.desc: Suggest a course of activity to one creature you can see. On a failed Wis save, it follows the suggestion.

spell.name: Tasha's Hideous Laughter
spell.desc: A creature perceives everything as hilariously funny and falls into fits of laughter. On failed Wis save, it's incapacitated.

spell.name: Telekinesis
spell.desc: You can move or manipulate creatures or objects using your mind. Move object up to 1000 lbs. or creature up to Large.

spell.name: Teleport
spell.desc: Teleport yourself and up to eight willing creatures or a single object to a destination you know on the same plane.

spell.name: Tenser's Floating Disk
spell.desc: Create a circular, horizontal plane of force, 3 feet in diameter and 1 inch thick, that floats 3 feet off the ground.

spell.name: Thaumaturgy
spell.desc: Manifest a minor wonder: your voice booms, flames flicker, the ground trembles, an unlocked door opens, etc.

spell.name: Thunderwave
spell.desc: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out. Creatures in a 15-foot cube take 2d8 thunder damage and are pushed 10 feet.

spell.name: Time Stop
spell.desc: Briefly stop the flow of time for everyone but yourself. Take 1d4+1 turns in a row.

spell.name: Tongues
spell.desc: Grant a creature the ability to understand any spoken language and to speak a language any creature speaking nearby understands.

spell.name: Tree Stride
spell.desc: Gain the ability to enter a tree and move from inside it to inside another tree of the same kind.

spell.name: True Seeing
spell.desc: Gives a willing creature truesight, notices secret doors, and can see into the Ethereal Plane, all out to 120 feet.

spell.name: Unseen Servant
spell.desc: Create an invisible, mindless, shapeless force that performs simple tasks at your command.

spell.name: Wall of Fire
spell.desc: Create a wall of fire on solid surface. One side of the wall deals 5d8 fire damage to each creature within 10 feet.

spell.name: Wall of Force
spell.desc: Create an invisible wall of force on a surface you choose. Can be flat or hemispherical. Nothing passes through.

spell.name: Wall of Ice
spell.desc: Create a wall of ice on a solid surface. 10-foot-wide panels, 10 feet tall and 1 foot thick. 10d6 cold to breaching creatures.

spell.name: Wall of Stone
spell.desc: A nonmagical wall of solid stone springs up at a point you choose within range. Each panel is 10 by 10 by 6 inches.

spell.name: Water Breathing
spell.desc: Grant up to ten willing creatures the ability to breathe underwater until the spell ends.

spell.name: Water Walk
spell.desc: Grant the ability to move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

spell.name: Web
spell.desc: Conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing that fills a 20-foot cube. Creatures that fail Dex saves are restrained.

spell.name: Wind Walk
spell.desc: You and up to ten willing creatures transform into gaseous form and gain a flying speed of 300 feet.

spell.name: Wish
spell.desc: The mightiest spell a mortal can cast. Duplicate any spell of 8th level or lower, or create reality-altering effects.
